title: Christmas mobs
description: Gives nearly every mob a Santa hat and other christmas decoration!
body:
REQUIRES EMF+ETF

❄️MOBS CELEBRATE CHRISTMAS NOW!❄️

This resource pack gives nearly all mobs christmas decoration.
Most of them will just have a simple Santa Claus hat but other mobs will look a bit different like the villagers being elfs and the horses being reindeers.
This pack is just a cute little way of bringin christmas into minecraft without changing much.
